channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Ruby (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Ruby nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 mame/ai-coding-lang-bench (60 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mame

📝 Repository: mame/ai-coding-lang-bench

📄 Descrizione: Which programming language is best for AI coding agents? Benchmarking 13 languages with Claude Code.

⭐ Stelle: 60

🍴 Forks: 11

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-04T23:15:35Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-10T04:04:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 bit-of-a-shambles/open-tender-watch (47 ⭐)

item.title: 📝 Kenny421/turbo_crud (14 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Kenny421

📝 Repository: Kenny421/turbo_crud

📄 Descrizione: TurboCrud is a Rails gem that simplifies CRUD with Hotwire and Turbo. It provides modal and drawer forms, real-time updates, flash handling, and generators for fast setup. Works with existing apps or full scaffolds, boosting productivity and keeping your UI modern and responsive.

⭐ Stelle: 14

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Ruby

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-01T06:47:38Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-07T01:27:31Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
